${modID}:CardModText.DESCRIPTION: Cardsmods can use card strings to pull from to enjoy the benefits that provides.

${modID}:ScorchingSands.NAME: Scorching Sands
${modID}:ScorchingSands.DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Extinguish: Deal your ${modID}:Soul_Heat to an enemy !M! times.
${modID}:ScorchingSands.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Extinguish: Deal your ${modID}:Soul_Heat to an enemy !M! times.

${modID}:Sandshaping.NAME: Sandshaping
${modID}:Sandshaping.DESCRIPTION: Even ${modID}:Soul_Heat: Deal !D! damage. NL Odd ${modID}:Soul_Heat: Gain !B! Block.
${modID}:Sandshaping.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Even ${modID}:Soul_Heat: Deal !D! damage. NL Odd ${modID}:Soul_Heat: Gain !B! Block.

${modID}:Purify.NAME: Purify
${modID}:Purify.DESCRIPTION: {@@}Deal !D! damage. NL If the last card played this combat was a Skill, gain {!M!|repeat= [E]|>4= !M! [E]} and draw !M! card{!M!|1=|@=s}.
${modID}:Purify.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: {@@}Deal !D! damage. NL If the last card played this combat was a Skill, gain {!M!|repeat= [E]|>4= !M! [E]} and draw !M! card{!M!|1=|@=s}.

${modID}:SoulIntensifier.NAME: Soul Intensifier
${modID}:SoulIntensifier.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Apply !M! ${modID}:Relief. NL If the enemy has !${modID}:M2! or more ${modID}:Relief, apply it twice.
${modID}:SoulIntensifier.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Apply !M! ${modID}:Relief. NL If the enemy has !${modID}:M2! or more ${modID}:Relief, apply it twice.

${modID}:SunRay.NAME: Sun Ray
${modID}:SunRay.DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Extinguish. NL If ${modID}:Soul_Heat is !${modID}:M2! or higher, deal !D! damage. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:SunRay.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Retain. ${modID}:Extinguish. NL If ${modID}:Soul_Heat is !${modID}:M2! or higher, deal !D! damage. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:Sandstorm.NAME: Sandstorm
${modID}:Sandstorm.DESCRIPTION: Randomly deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. NL ${modID }:Extinguish: Deal damage again for each !${modID}:M2! ${modID}:Soul_Heat.
${modID}:Sandstorm.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Randomly deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. NL ${modID}:Extinguish: Deal damage again for each !${modID}:M2! ${modID}:Soul_Heat.

${modID}:SpiritualBurst.NAME: Spiritual Burst
${modID}:SpiritualBurst.DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Extinguish. NL If ${modID}:Soul_Heat is !${modID}:M2! or higher, deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:SpiritualBurst.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Retain. NL ${modID}:Extinguish. NL If ${modID}:Soul_Heat is !${modID}:M2! or higher, deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:AbradingTouch.NAME: Abrading Touch
${modID}:AbradingTouch.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Damage this card would deal is applied as ${modID}:Relief instead.
${modID}:AbradingTouch.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Damage this card would deal is applied as ${modID}:Relief instead.

${modID}:PurgingEruption.NAME: Purging Eruption
${modID}:PurgingEruption.DESCRIPTION: Deal damage to ALL enemies equal to their ${modID}:Relief X times. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:PurgingEruption.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal damage to ALL enemies equal to their ${modID}:Relief X times.

${modID}:FieryProjection.NAME: Fiery Projection
${modID}:FieryProjection.DESCRIPTION: {@@}Deal !D! damage. NL Play the top {!M!|1=|@=!M! }card{!M!|1=|@=s} of your draw pile and ${modID}:Suspend {!M!|1=it|@=them}.
${modID}:FieryProjection.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: {@@}Deal !D! damage. NL Play the top {!M!|1=|@=!M! }card{!M!|1=|@=s} of your draw pile and ${modID}:Suspend {!M!|1=it|@=them}.

${modID}:CleansingConflagration.NAME: Cleanse Conflagration
${modID}:CleansingConflagration.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage and apply !M! ${modID}:Relief to ALL enemies. NL Gain !M! ${modID}:Relief for each enemy hit.
${modID}:CleansingConflagration.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage and apply !M! ${modID}:Relief to ALL enemies. NL Gain !M! ${modID}:Relief for each enemy hit.

${modID}:DrawRisky.NAME: Draw Risky
${modID}:DrawRisky.DESCRIPTION: {@@}Deal !D! damage. NL Draw !M! card. If you draw an Attack, gain {!${modID}:M2!|repeat= [E]|>4= !${modID}:M2! [E]} . NL ${modID}:Suspend.
${modID}:DrawRisky.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: {@@}Deal !D! damage. NL Draw !M! card. If you draw an Attack, gain {!${modID}:M2!|repeat= [E]|>4= !${modID}:M2! [E]} . NL ${modID}:Suspend.

${modID}:BloodySolstice.NAME: Bloody Solstice
${modID}:BloodySolstice.DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Extinguish. NL If ${modID}:Soul_Heat is !${modID}:M2! or higher, deal !D! damage. NL ${modID}:Suspend.
${modID}:BloodySolstice.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Extinguish. NL If ${modID}:Soul_Heat is !${modID}:M2! or higher, deal !D! damage. NL ${modID}:Suspend.

${modID}:SharkStrike.NAME: Shark Strike
${modID}:SharkStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Whenever you are attacked this turn, deal !D! damage back.
${modID}:SharkStrike.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Whenever you are attacked this turn, deal !D! damage back.

${modID}:GhastlyFire.NAME: Ghastly Fire
${modID}:GhastlyFire.DESCRIPTION: Deal damage equal to your ${modID}:Relief. NL Trigger your ${modID}:Relief.
${modID}:GhastlyFire.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal damage equal to your ${modID}:Relief. NL Trigger your ${modID}:Relief.

${modID}:GlassDaggers.NAME: Glass Daggers
${modID}:GlassDaggers.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage 2 times. NL Apply !M! Weak.
${modID}:GlassDaggers.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage 2 times. NL Apply !M! Weak.

${modID}:Enhance.NAME: Enhance
${modID}:Enhance.DESCRIPTION: Upgrade a card in your hand. If ${modID}:Soul_Heat is at least !${modID}:M2!, Upgrade your hand instead. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:Enhance.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Upgrade a card in your hand. If ${modID}:Soul_Heat is at least !${modID}:M2!, Upgrade your hand instead. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:DistortionHieroglyph.NAME: Distortion Glyph
${modID}:DistortionHieroglyph.DESCRIPTION: {@@}!M! time{!M!|1=|@=s} this turn, your ${modID}:Soul_Heat is treated as if it were *exactly 10.
${modID}:DistortionHieroglyph.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: {@@}!M! time{!M!|1=|@=s} this turn, your ${modID}:Soul_Heat is treated as if it were *exactly 10.

${modID}:Soulburn.NAME: Soulburn
${modID}:Soulburn.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Apply your ${modID}:Soul_Heat plus !M! to ANYONE as ${modID}:Relief.

${modID}:SelflessIgnite.NAME: Selfless Ignite
${modID}:SelflessIgnite.DESCRIPTION: Trigger ANYONE'S ${modID}:Relief without reducing it. NL ${modID}:Afflict !${modID}:M2!.

${modID}:MinorStasis.NAME: Minor Stasis
${modID}:MinorStasis.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Gain !M! ${modID}:Relief. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:MinorStasis.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Gain !M! ${modID}:Relief. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:RollingStars.NAME: Rolling Stars
${modID}:RollingStars.DESCRIPTION: {@@}Discard a card. NL Draw !M! card{!M!|1=|@=s}. NL If ${modID}:Soul_Heat is !${modID}:M2! or less, gain !M! ${modID}:Soul_Heat.
${modID}:RollingStars.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: {@@}Discard a card. NL Draw !M! card{!M!|1=|@=s}. NL If ${modID}:Soul_Heat is !${modID}:M2! or less, gain !M! ${modID}:Soul_Heat.

${modID}:DuneSurfing.NAME: Dune Surfing
${modID}:DuneSurfing.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Retain. NL ${modID}:Extinguish: Draw a card for each !${modID}:M2! ${modID}:Soul_Heat.

${modID}:BehenianHowl.NAME: Behenian Howl
${modID}:BehenianHowl.DESCRIPTION: {@@}Gain {!M!|repeat= [E]|>4= !M! [E]} . NL If ${modID}:Soul_Heat is at least !${modID}:M2!, gain ${modID}:Hourglass_Mastery. NL ${modID}:Suspend.
${modID}:BehenianHowl.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: {@@}Gain {!M!|repeat= [E]|>4= !M! [E]} . NL If ${modID}:Soul_Heat is at least !${modID}:M2!, gain ${modID}:Hourglass_Mastery. NL ${modID}:Suspend.

${modID}:SpreadEssence.NAME: Spread Essence
${modID}:SpreadEssence.DESCRIPTION: Remove ANYONE'S ${modID}:Relief. NL EVERYONE else gains that much ${modID}:Relief. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:SpreadEssence.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Retain. NL Remove ANYONE'S ${modID}:Relief. NL EVERYONE else gains that much ${modID}:Relief. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:MinorShield.NAME: Minor Shield
${modID}:MinorShield.DESCRIPTION: Gain your ${modID}:Soul_Heat as Block. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:SyphonHourglass.NAME: Syphon Hourglass
${modID}:SyphonHourglass.DESCRIPTION: Remove ANYONE'S ${modID}:Relief to gain the same amount of Block.
${modID}:SyphonHourglass.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Remove ANYONE'S ${modID}:Relief to gain the same amount of Block.

${modID}:AstralMantra.NAME: Astral Mantra
${modID}:AstralMantra.DESCRIPTION: {@@}Draw !M! card{!M!|1=|@=s}. NL If ${modID}:Soul_Heat is at least !${modID}:M2!, add !M! card{!M!|1=|@=s} from your draw pile to your hand instead. NL ${modID}:Suspend.
${modID}:AstralMantra.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: {@@}Draw !M! card{!M!|1=|@=s}. NL If ${modID}:Soul_Heat is at least !${modID}:M2!, add !M! card{!M!|1=|@=s} from your draw pile to your hand instead. NL ${modID}:Suspend.

${modID}:PrecisionMantra.NAME: Precision Mantra
${modID}:PrecisionMantra.DESCRIPTION: {@@}${modID}:Relief isn't reduced when triggered for !M! turn{!M!|1=|@=s}. NL ${modID}:Suspend.
${modID}:PrecisionMantra.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: {@@}Retain. NL ${modID}:Relief isn't reduced when triggered for !M! turn{!M!|1=|@=s}. NL ${modID}:Suspend.

${modID}:DrawBalanced.NAME: Draw Balanced
${modID}:DrawBalanced.DESCRIPTION: {@@}Draw !M! card{!M!|1=|@=s}. NL Randomly discard !${modID}:M2! card{!${modID}:M2!|1=|@=s}. NL ${modID}:Suspend.
${modID}:DrawBalanced.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: {@@}Draw !M! card{!M!|1=|@=s}. NL Randomly discard !${modID}:M2! card{!${modID}:M2!|1=|@=s}. NL ${modID}:Suspend.

${modID}:AstralRebound.NAME: Astral Rebound
${modID}:AstralRebound.DESCRIPTION: {@@}${modID}:Suspend !M! card{!M!|1=|@=s} in your hand to gain [E] equal to {!M!|1=its|@=their combined} cost. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:AstralRebound.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: {@@}${modID}:Suspend !M! card{!M!|1=|@=s} in your hand to gain [E] equal to {!M!|1=its|@=their combined} cost. NL Suspend.

${modID}:Copycat.NAME: Copycat
${modID}:Copycat.DESCRIPTION: {@@}Make !M! cop{!M!|1=y|@=irs} of a card. NL Purge.
${modID}:Copycat.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: {@@}Make !M! cop{!M!|1=y|@=irs} of a card. NL Purge.

${modID}:ShieldBoomerang.NAME: Shield Boomerang
${modID}:ShieldBoomerang.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL When gaining ${modID}:Hourglass_Mastery, return this card from the discard pile to your hand. NL ${modID}:Timeless.
${modID}:ShieldBoomerang.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL When gaining ${modID}:Hourglass_Mastery, return this card from the discard pile to your hand. NL ${modID}:Timeless.

${modID}:Incorruptible.NAME: Incorruptible
${modID}:Incorruptible.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Costs 0 while your ${modID}:Soul_Heat is !${modID}:M2! or more. NL ${modID}:Suspend.
${modID}:Incorruptible.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Costs 0 while your ${modID}:Soul_Heat is !${modID}:M2! or more. NL ${modID}:Suspend.

${modID}:Inventive.NAME: Inventive
${modID}:Inventive.DESCRIPTION: {@@}Reduce the cost of !M! card{!M!|1=|@=s} by !${modID}:M2! this turn. NL ${modID}:Suspend.
${modID}:Inventive.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: {@@}Reduce the cost of !M! card{!M!|1=|@=s} by !${modID}:M2! this turn. NL ${modID}:Suspend.

${modID}:BrightEnhancement.NAME: Bright Enhancement
${modID}:BrightEnhancement.DESCRIPTION: {@@}Increase ANYONE'S ${modID}:Relief by !${modID}:M2!%. NL The next {!M!|1=time|@=!M! times} their *Relief is triggered, it doesn't decrease. NL ${modID}:Suspend.
${modID}:BrightEnhancement.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: {@@}Increase ANYONE'S ${modID}:Relief by !${modID}:M2!%. NL The next {!M!|1=time|@=!M! times} their *Relief is triggered, it doesn't decrease. NL ${modID}:Suspend.

${modID}:Ascend.NAME: Ascend
${modID}:Ascend.DESCRIPTION: This turn, your next X cards with a cost of 2 or higher are free to play. NL ${modID}:Suspend.
${modID}:Ascend.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: This turn, your next X+!M! cards with a cost of 2 or higher are free to play. NL ${modID}:Suspend.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: This turn, your next X+!M! cards with a cost of 2 or higher are free to play. NL ${modID}:Suspend.

${modID}:vff.NAME: Chanting
${modID}:vff.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Kindle. NL 2: Scry !M! card(s). NL 4: Draw a card. NL 10: Gain [E] . NL ${modID}:Suspend.

${modID}:HourglassMirage.NAME: Hourglass Mirage
${modID}:HourglassMirage.DESCRIPTION: {@@}The {!M!|1=first time|@=!M! times} your ${modID}:Soul_Heat caps each turn, ${modID}:Extinguish: Gain ${modID}:Hourglass_Mastery.
${modID}:HourglassMirage.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: {@@}The first {!M!|1=time|@=!M! times} your ${modID}:Soul_Heat caps each turn, ${modID}:Extinguish: Gain ${modID}:Hourglass_Mastery.

${modID}:FlammableChakram.NAME: Flammable Chakram
${modID}:FlammableChakram.DESCRIPTION: Whenever an Attack deals unblocked damage, apply !M! ${modID}:Relief.
${modID}:FlammableChakram.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Whenever an Attack deals unblocked damage, apply !M! ${modID}:Relief.

${modID}:Concentration.NAME: Concentration
${modID}:Concentration.DESCRIPTION: Retain. NL At the start of the turn, gain !M! ${modID}:Soul_Heat.
${modID}:Concentration.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Innate. Retain. NL At the start of the turn, gain !M! ${modID}:Soul_Heat.

${modID}:FireBreath.NAME: Fire Breath
${modID}:FireBreath.DESCRIPTION: Deal !M! more Attack damage while ${modID}:Soul_Heat is at least 10.
${modID}:FireBreath.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !M! more Attack damage while ${modID}:Soul_Heat is at least 10.

${modID}:AreaRelief.NAME: Area Relief
${modID}:AreaRelief.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you apply ${modID}:Relief to an enemy, gain !M! ${modID}:Relief.
${modID}:AreaRelief.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Whenever you apply ${modID}:Relief to an enemy, gain !M! ${modID}:Relief.

${modID}:InnerWarmth.NAME: Inner Warmth
${modID}:InnerWarmth.DESCRIPTION: {@@}Prevent the next !M! time{!M!|1=|@=s} your ${modID}:Soul_Heat would reset or be ${modID}:Extinguished.
${modID}:InnerWarmth.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: {@@}Retain. NL Prevent the next !M! time{!M!|1=|@=s} your ${modID}:Soul_Heat would reset or be ${modID}:Extinguished.

${modID}:DrawSafe.NAME: Draw Safe
${modID}:DrawSafe.DESCRIPTION: {@@}At the start of your turn, draw !M! card{!M!|1=|@=s}.
${modID}:DrawSafe.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: {@@}At the start of your turn, draw !M! card{!M!|1=|@=s}.

${modID}:Expertise.NAME: Expertise
${modID}:Expertise.DESCRIPTION: {@@}!M! time{!M!|1=|@=s} each turn, your ${modID}:Soul_Heat will be treated as exactly 10.
${modID}:Expertise.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: {@@}Innate. NL !M! time{!M!|1=|@=s} each turn, your ${modID}:Soul_Heat will be treated as exactly 10.

${modID}:AreaBarrier.NAME: Area Barrier
${modID}:AreaBarrier.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you are attacked, apply !M! ${modID}:Relief back.
${modID}:AreaBarrier.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Whenever you are attacked, apply !M! ${modID}:Relief back.

${modID}:EclipseGaze.NAME: Eclipse Gaze
${modID}:EclipseGaze.DESCRIPTION: When you play a card that costs 2 or more, EVERYONE gains !M! ${modID}:Relief.
${modID}:EclipseGaze.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: When you play a card that costs 2 or more, EVERYONE gains !M! ${modID}:Relief.

${modID}:Chanting.NAME: Chanting
${modID}:Chanting.DESCRIPTION: Ethereal. ${modID}:Chanting. NL Deal !D! damage. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:Chanting.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Ethereal. ${modID}:Chanting. NL Deal !D! damage. NL Gain !M! ${modID}:Chanting. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:QuicksandDance.NAME: Quicksand Dance
${modID}:QuicksandDance.DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turn, gain !M! ${modID}:Chanting.
${modID}:QuicksandDance.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Innate. NL At the start of your turn, gain !M! ${modID}:Chanting.

${modID}:AreaChanting.NAME: Area Chanting
${modID}:AreaChanting.DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Chanting. NL Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:AreaChanting.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Chanting. NL Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies.

${modID}:SearingRitual.NAME: Searing Ritual
${modID}:SearingRitual.DESCRIPTION: {@@}${modID}:Chanting. NL Randomly deal !D! damage !M! time{!M!|1=|@=s}. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:SearingRitual.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: {@@}${modID}:Chanting. NL Randomly deal !D! damage !M! time{!M!|1=|@=s}. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:ChainedChanting.NAME: Chained Chanting
${modID}:ChainedChanting.DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Chanting. NL Deal !D! damage. NL Add !M! *Chanting to your hand.
${modID}:ChainedChanting.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Chanting. NL Deal !D! damage. NL Add !M! *Chanting to your hand.

${modID}:AuspiciousChanting.NAME: Auspicious Chanting
${modID}:AuspiciousChanting.DESCRIPTION: {@@}${modID}:Chanting. NL Deal !D! damage. NL Draw !M! card{!M!|1=|@=s} next turn.
${modID}:AuspiciousChanting.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: {@@}${modID}:Chanting. NL Deal !D! damage. NL Draw !M! card{!M!|1=|@=s} next turn.

${modID}:WickedChanting.NAME: Wicked Chanting
${modID}:WickedChanting.DESCRIPTION: {@@}${modID}:Chanting. NL Deal !D! damage. NL Apply !M! Vulnerable. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:WickedChanting.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: {@@}${modID}:Chanting. NL Deal !D! damage. NL Apply !M! Vulnerable.
